<noinclude>
This is the '''Source''' template. It is used for documenting source materials and citations.

[[Category:Templates]]
</noinclude><includeonly>
{| class="wikitable" style="float:right; margin-left:1em; width:300px;"
|+ style="font-size:1.1em; font-weight:bold;" | Source
|-
! Type
| [[Source Type::{{{Source Type|}}}]]
|-
! Title
| [[Source Title::{{{Source Title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]
{{#if:{{{Source Date|}}}|{{!}}-
! Date
{{!}} [[Source Date::{{{Source Date|}}}]]}}
{{#if:{{{Source Author|}}}|{{!}}-
! Author
{{!}} [[Source Author::{{{Source Author|}}}]]}}
{{#if:{{{Source URL|}}}|{{!}}-
! URL
{{!}} [[Source URL::{{{Source URL|}}}]]}}
{{#if:{{{Source Repository|}}}|{{!}}-
! Repository
{{!}} [[Source Repository::{{{Source Repository|}}}]]}}
|}

== Description ==
''Describe this source and its relevance to Benicia history.''

== Properties Referenced ==
{{#ask:[[Category:Properties]][[Has source::{{PAGENAME}}]]
|?Current Address
|?Year Built
|format=table
|limit=100
}}

[[Category:Sources]]
{{#ifeq:{{{Source Type|}}}|Census|[[Category:Primary Sources]]|
{{#ifeq:{{{Source Type|}}}|Sanborn Map|[[Category:Primary Sources]]|
{{#ifeq:{{{Source Type|}}}|Survey|[[Category:Primary Sources]]|
{{#ifeq:{{{Source Type|}}}|Archive|[[Category:Primary Sources]]|
[[Category:Secondary Sources]]
}}}}}}}}
</includeonly>
